meta.name: description
meta.content: Approved K-Rend & Weber render application in Guildford & Surrey. Spray-applied silicone-monocouche systems, through-coloured, warranty-backed. £55–80/m². Free survey.
K-Rend & Weber Render Guildford & Surrey | Guildford Render
Approved K-Rend & Weber render application in Guildford & Surrey. Spray-applied silicone-monocouche systems, through-coloured, warranty-backed. £55–80/m². Free survey.

The finished look and lifespan of the two are very close."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Do I need approved applicators for K-Rend?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "To preserve the manufacturer warranty, yes \u2014 the system must be applied to specification. We're trained, approved applicators for K-Rend and Weber."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can K-Rend go over old render?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "If the existing surface is sound, often yes. If it's hollow or cracked it's hacked off first. We assess at survey so the new system bonds correctly."}}]}

div.p: K-Rend and Weber are BBA-certified silicone-monocouche render systems costing £55–£80/m² installed. They are through-coloured, self-cleaning and spray-applied for a flawless modern facade.
Instant guide estimate. Surrey rates, updated June 2025.
div.label: Property type
Existing surface

select.option: Render over sound surface / new build
Includes hack-off of old render / pebbledash

div.label: Access
div.p: Guide figures only. Fixed written price confirmed after a free survey.

div.h2: What are K-Rend and Weber render systems?
div.p: K-Rend and Weber are through-coloured silicone-monocouche render systems made by Saint-Gobain. They combine the durability of monocouche with the hydrophobic, self-cleaning topcoat of silicone. Both are BBA-certified and applied as a full kit.

In entity terms: K-Rend is-a silicone-silicate render system; its application is spray or hand-float; its components are base coat, alkali-resistant mesh, primer and topcoat; its warranty depends on certified-applicator installation.
div.h2: How much does K-Rend cost per m²?
div.p: K-Rend costs £55–£80/m² installed, with Weber slightly lower at £50–£75/m². The finished appearance and lifespan of the two systems are very close.
div.h2: Why does it matter who applies K-Rend?
div.p: K-Rend must be applied by trained, approved applicators to the manufacturer specification to keep the warranty valid. Incorrect prep, thickness or mixed components void cover and shorten the render's life.
div.h2: Can K-Rend be applied over old render?
div.p: K-Rend can be applied over sound existing render; hollow or cracked render is hacked off first. The substrate is tap-tested at survey so the new system bonds correctly.
Typically £55–£80/m² installed; Weber £50–£75/m². The finished look and lifespan are very close.

div.button: Is K-Rend better than standard render?+

div.p: K-Rend is a polymer-modified, through-coloured silicone system — more flexible, breathable and self-cleaning than traditional sand-and-cement, with no repainting.

div.button: Do I need approved applicators for K-Rend?+

div.p: To preserve the manufacturer warranty, yes — the system must be applied to specification by approved applicators.

div.button: Can K-Rend go over old render?+

div.p: If the existing surface is sound, often yes. If it is hollow or cracked it is hacked off first.
Free survey & fixed quote
Mon–Fri 7:30–6 · Sat 8–2 · Same-day reply
K-Rend & Weber Render — key data
Render systems

div.h2: Ready to transform your home's exterior?
div.p: Free survey, fixed written quote, no obligation. Through-coloured render that lasts decades and never needs painting.
House rendering specialists across Guildford and Surrey. Silicone, monocouche, K-Rend and external wall insulation — through-coloured renders built to last.
© 2025 Guildford Render. House rendering across Guildford & Surrey.
01483 000 000 · hello@guildfordrender.co.uk
